title: Splash for Christmas
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - About 120 early morning dippers frolicked in the sea at Central Beach, Plett, at 05:00 today 1 December - part of the Sunrise Dippers that take to the ocean on the first of every month.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - About 120 early morning dippers frolicked in the sea at Central Beach, Plett, at 05:00 today 1 December - part of the Sunrise Dippers that take to the ocean on the first of every month."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The dip had a dual significance as a large group from the Adopt a Swimmer (in blue swim suits) took to the ocean for the first time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Adopt a Swimmer is an NGO that takes people unfamiliar with water and swimming to a stage where they enjoy swimming. This empowerment also gives them an opportunity to learn more about themselves as individuals.","html":"Adopt a Swimmer is an NGO that takes people unfamiliar with water and swimming to a stage where they enjoy swimming. This empowerment also gives them an opportunity to learn more about themselves as individuals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sunrise Dippers Margy Anderson and Maria Vasco from Plett joined in the festive spirit with headgear flashing everyone a  Merry Christmas!","html":"Sunrise Dippers Margy Anderson and Maria Vasco from Plett joined in the festive spirit with headgear flashing everyone a Merry Christmas!"},{"type":"heading","text":"Video: Chris van Gass","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
